name: Pop the Fruits
description: Dive into the juicy world of fruity fun! In this exciting game, youll be shooting vibrant bubbles that are actually... fruits! Lush oranges, sweet strawberries, juicy watermelons, and other delicious treats await you. Shoot fruits, create combos, and savor the sweet taste of victory! Who knew playing with food could be this thrilling?
instructions: Hold on the screen to aim your fruits direction Release your mouse or finger to launch the fruit Match 3 or more identical fruits to clear them from the board Earn score boosts by chaining multiple combos in a row Don rsquo t let the fruits reach
tags: free html5 games for your website
